action: Create a falsifiable acoustic loopback detector that distinguishes browser processing evidence from microphone-observed physical output evidence.

progress.finding: Permission-gated microphone capture can raise V-001 evidence above browser render-state observation by testing whether the diagnostic frequency entered the acoustic environment, while still not proving listener perception or emitter identity.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files

handoff: Vercel Studio should acquire a short microphone window only after explicit user permission, detect the existing 523.25 Hz diagnostic pulse, discard raw samples after analysis, and bind the result to the R-033 session packet. Run a muted-output control trial to establish falsifiability.
